name: Doodle Adventure of Chameleon
short_description: Chameleon is a side-scrolling platformer with a hand-drawn doodle style. In this world of doodles, you will play as a chameleon created by a young boy's imagination. With the whimsical and imaginative adventures the young boy envisions, the charming chameleon embarks on thrilling adventures!
detailed_description:
Official Community

Discord:


About the Game

"Doodle adventure of Chameleon" is a hand-drawn doodle-style hardcore side-scrolling platformer game. You'll play as a chameleon born from a young boy's imagination. By using your color-switching abilities, you can alter the elements of the game world as you navigate through different flat worlds, such as a sketchbook, a blackboard, and a storybook. As you tackle challenging levels, you'll gradually enter the boy's inner world and help him overcome the challenges of growing up.

Childhood hand-drawn doodle style


This game captures the brushstrokes of childhood doodles, taking you back to an imaginative time when you could savor the simple joys and dreams of your early years.

Fun gameplay mechanics centered around color-changing


You need to make clever use of the chameleon's color-switching ability by freely switching between red, yellow, and blue colors to alter the elements in the game world. You must skillfully combine wall climbing, jumping, sprinting, and other actions to solve a series of puzzles.

Unique level settings and puzzles


As you progress through the levels and shift between the different flat worlds, new scene mechanics and puzzles will emerge, creating an enjoyable synergy with the color-switching gameplay. Enjoy the thrill of precise timing and route planning!


Additionally, the game features a chalkboard-style with chalk drawings and familiar elements such as math formulas, timetables, and classroom assignments. In these entertaining scenes, the chameleon embarks on a joyful adventure.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Turkish, Portuguese - Portugal
